title: Parameter/enum gives AstNode is not of expected type

features.name: localparam name matching enum item identifier in package
features.description: Code should include a localparam declared in a package where the parameter name matches an enum item identifier from an enum typedef in the same scope

features.name: enum item value referencing parameter with same name
features.description: Code should include an enum typedef where one of the enum item values has a name that is also used as a localparam parameter in the same package scope
